Step 1: Open the Bosch login URL in your: 第 1 步：在浏览器中打开 Bosch 登录 URL
Open Bosch Login in browser: 在浏览器中打开 Bosch 登录
Bosch login URL (manual fallback): Bosch 登录 URL（手动后备）
Reset login (clear tokens & restart): 重置登录（清除令牌并重启）
This clears all Bosch tokens and restart: 这将清除所有 Bosch 令牌并重启适配器。需要再次登录。继续？
Step 2: Paste the redirect URL: 第 2 步：粘贴重定向 URL
Bosch cloud region (EU for Europe): Bosch 云区域（EU 为欧洲）
External recorder integration (BlueIris,: 外部录像机集成（BlueIris、Frigate 等）
By default the per-camera RTSP proxy lis: 默认情况下，每台摄像头的 RTSP 代理仅监听 127.0.0.1 — 只能从 ioBroker 主机本身访问（cameras 适配器、FFmpeg、go2rtc）。启用 LAN 暴露以允许另一台主机上的录像机拉取流。已发布的 cameras.<id>.stream_url 已包含 Digest 凭据，因此粘贴到录像机后 URL 可直接使用。
Expose RTSP proxy to LAN: 将 RTSP 代理暴露到 LAN
Bind the proxy to 0.0.0.0 (all interface: 将代理绑定到 0.0.0.0（所有接口）而不是 127.0.0.1。在其他主机上运行 BlueIris / Frigate 时需要。
Hostname or IP the recorder should use t: 录像机用于访问代理的主机名或 IP，例如 "192.168.1.50"。用于已发布的 stream_url。留空则保持 127.0.0.1。
When the camera reports a motion / perso: 当摄像头报告 motion / person / audio_alarm 事件时（通过 FCM 推送或轮询回退），自动获取一张新快照并将 base64 编码副本写入 cameras.<id>.last_event_image。非常适合 Telegram / Signal / Matrix 推送通知：你的自动化读取 last_event_image 并直接转发 JPEG，无需单独的 snapshot_trigger。突发（连续运动）复用温的 Bosch 会话，配额保持较低。
Fetches a fresh JPEG on every motion / p: 在每个 motion / person / audio_alarm 事件时获取新 JPEG，同时更新 cameras.<id>.snapshot_path（文件存储）和 cameras.<id>.last_event_image（base64 字符串）。
How it works: click the blue button belo: How it works: click the blue button below to open the Bosch SingleKey login in a new browser tab. Sign in (with captcha / MFA if Bosch asks). Bosch then redirects your browser to https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=XXX&state=YYY — the page usually shows a blank screen or a 404, that is expected. Copy the FULL URL from the browser's address bar and paste it into Step 2 below.
⚠ Copy the redirect URL within ~60 secon: ⚠ Copy the redirect URL within ~60 seconds. The Bosch auth code in that URL expires very quickly — if you wait too long, the paste will fail with 'code expired'. Keep this dialog open in a second tab so you can paste immediately. If it expires, just click 'Open Bosch Login' again for a fresh URL.
Paste the FULL URL from the browser addr: Paste the FULL URL from the browser address bar immediately after Bosch redirects you — within ~60 seconds, otherwise the auth code expires. The 404 page or blank screen you may see is expected; only the URL matters.
